overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character traverses neon-lit sidewalks under elevated highways, crosses intersections with dynamic lighting that shifts between teal, red, blue, and golden hour tones, and moves through a dense futuristic urban environment featuring holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with teal neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing a purple vending machine and metal guard rails

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete and metal elevated highway or monorail track running overhead with support pillars
bright purple futuristic vending machine with glowing panels and digital display
metal barrier with horizontal bars separating sidewalk from the road
teal-colored neon light strips illuminating the underside of the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk sheltered under an elevated highway structure. Teal neon lights illuminate the scene from above, casting a cyberpunk glow on the environment. A distinctive purple vending machine stands on the right side as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk under overpass with shifting neon colors

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and onto the yellow striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane road
lighting shifts from yellow under the overpass to vibrant red and pink neon on the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road via the striped crosswalk, moving toward the red-lit side of the street while avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving along the road under the overpass

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes painted on the asphalt
large digital advertisement screen mounted on building facade showing animated content
building front illuminated with intense red neon lighting and vertical signage

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection via a yellow-striped crosswalk. The environment transitions from teal to warm yellow lighting under the overpass, then shifts dramatically to red and pink neon as the character reaches the opposite side. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with blue neon lighting and digital advertisements

events.description: ambient lighting transitions from red to blue and cyan tones as character approaches the next intersection
character comes to a complete stop at the crosswalk waiting area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and digital signs, then stopping at the crosswalk edge to wait for the signal

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright blue pants and yellow jacket standing near the crosswalk
group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: building exterior with blue neon lighting and large digital advertisement screens
futuristic traffic signal pole with illuminated displays and crosswalk signals

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk bathed in blue neon light, passing digital advertisement screens and other pedestrians. The lighting shifts from red to blue as the character approaches an intersection, eventually stopping at the crosswalk edge to wait for the pedestrian signal.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection at dusk with visible sunset sky and golden hour lighting

events.description: pedestrian walk signal illuminates on the ground in green and character begins crossing the street
scene lighting shifts dramatically from blue neon to warm golden hour sunlight as character enters the open intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk edge for the signal with other pedestrians, then stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across as the light changes to green

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at the crosswalk who starts crossing simultaneously with the character

entered.detail: open sky visible with warm orange and purple sunset colors breaking through the urban canyon
tall futuristic tower with illuminated windows and industrial structures in the distance
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes and green WALK projection on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character waits at a crosswalk in blue-lit shade, then begins crossing as the signal changes. Upon entering the intersection, the scene opens up to reveal a stunning sunset sky with warm golden light replacing the neon tones. The character walks across the broad crosswalk toward a distant futuristic skyscraper while other pedestrians cross alongside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit city vista. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk under an elevated highway, where teal neon lights cast a cyberpunk glow over a purple vending machine. As the character crosses a yellow-striped intersection, the lighting shifts from warm yellow to dramatic red and pink tones while a futuristic vehicle passes by. The scene then transitions into a blue-lit commercial district filled with digital advertisements and pedestrians before the character pauses at a crosswalk edge. Finally, as the character steps back into the intersection, the blue shade gives way to a stunning sunset sky, replacing the neon hues with warm golden light that illuminates a distant futuristic skyscraper.
